item.title: Article Words
item.description:
instructor

noun. 教练，导师；大学讲师
ins I-N-S
truc T-R-U-C
tor T-O-R
instructor. instructors.
We are your instructors.
We are your instructors.
We are your instructors.

thrill

n. 兴奋，激动；

v. 使（某人）非常兴奋，非常激动； thrill T-H-R-I-L-L thrill I thrill to guide you do it. I thrill to guide you do it. I thrill to guide you do it.

guide

v. 带领，引导（某人至某地）；任向导；指导，影响；解释，阐明
n. 指南，手册；导游，向导；准则，指针
guide g-u-i-d-e
guide.
We are thrilled to guide you.
We are thrilled to guide you.
We are thrilled to guide you.
